practice.text: What's your guilty-pleasure song, show, or snack?
What's your most-used emoji, and what does that say about you?
What's something in your kitchen you can't quite justify owning?

prompts.text: What song do you secretly know every single word to?
What food would you eat every day if nobody judged you?
What show have you rewatched more times than you'd care to admit?
Who's your most embarrassing celebrity crush, past or present?
What movie does everyone love that you just can't stand?
What music from your teenage years do you still blast when you're alone?
What's the silliest thing that has ever made you cry?
What snack are you quietly territorial about?
What's a hidden talent that nobody at this table has ever seen?
What's the strangest thing you've ever won a prize, trophy, or certificate for?
What celebrity have you met or nearly met — and how did it go?
What's the weirdest job or side gig you've ever had?
What topic could you give a surprise 20-minute talk on, no notes needed?
What's the strangest thing you've ever collected — and do you still have it?
What did you believe for way too long as a kid?
What's the most out-of-character thing you've ever done on a dare?
What weird food combination do you genuinely love?
What's something you still do exactly the way you did it when you were eight?
What speech or argument do you rehearse in the shower?
What's your most irrational fear?
What's the strangest thing you do when you're home alone?
What do you do in the car alone that would stop instantly with a passenger?
What completely normal thing do you somehow do wrong, according to everyone?
What tiny victory do you celebrate way too hard?
What's the dumbest way you've ever injured yourself?
What fashion choice from your past should never, ever resurface?
What nickname have you had that you absolutely hated?
What's your go-to karaoke song — and what happens to you when you perform it?
What's the most ridiculous thing you've done to avoid a neighbor or acquaintance?
What's the funniest thing that happened while you were completely lost?
What autocorrect or wrong-person text disaster still haunts you?
When did you laugh hardest at the worst possible moment?
What's a hidden talent you've never shown anyone at this table — and why not?
What's the closest you've ever come to being famous, infamous, or on the news?
What's the most rebellious thing you did before turning 18?
What skill from a past job or past life would genuinely surprise this table?
What's the weirdest thing you've ever done for money?
What's the most impulsive thing you've ever bought, booked, or agreed to?
Where have you been that nobody at this table would ever guess?
What screen name or nickname have you gone by that you'd rather explain now than have discovered?
What's the strangest competition or bet you've ever entered?
What's one thing you did exactly once and will never, ever do again?
What's one thing your partner does that you've pretended not to notice for years?
What did you *really* think at the end of your first date with your partner?
What gift from your partner did you secretly return, regift, or bury in a closet?
Which of your partner's stories could you recite word-for-word, including the pauses?
What have you blamed on traffic, the dog, or the kids that was actually you?
What do you do differently the moment your partner leaves town?
What did your family honestly say about your partner after first meeting them?
What hill does your partner die on that you find completely ridiculous?
When did you last pretend to be asleep, and what were you avoiding?
What "joint decision" in your house was actually decided before the conversation started?
What was your honest first impression of the person seated to your left?
Who at this table would survive longest in an apocalypse — and who's gone in the first week?
Who here is most likely to be living a secret second life, and what is it?
Which couple at this table trash-talks the other couple more over text?
Who here is the worst driver? Cite your evidence.
What does someone at this table do that you find secretly hilarious?
Who here would you call to help you bury a problem — and who must never know?
If you swapped lives with someone here for a week, whose — and what's the first thing you'd fix?
Who at this table is most likely to end up briefly famous, and for what?
What's a fashion choice by someone here that you have heroically never commented on?
What's the most elaborate lie you've told to get out of plans — possibly with people at this table?
What's something you've never told anyone at this table?
What's the most money you've spent that nobody in your life knows about?
What text did you once send to the wrong person, and what did it say?
Which ex would you be most nervous to bump into tonight, and why?
What's the closest you've ever come to being fired?
What rule do you break regularly with zero guilt?
What's your most embarrassing recurring thought?
What's the strangest thing you do when you're home completely alone?
If your worst 24 hours became a documentary, what's its title?
What's the most embarrassing thing you ever did to impress a crush?
What's a date so bad you engineered an early exit — and what was the move?
What's the cringiest thing living in your old messages to an ex?
Who did you pretend not to like while very much liking them?
What's the longest you pined for someone who had absolutely no idea?
What did you wear on a date once that felt like a great idea at the time?
What's the worst pickup line you've actually used — and did it work?
What crush did you have that this table would find hilarious?
What do you do when your partner's away that stops the second they're home?
What have you blamed on the dog, the kids, or 'the wind'?
What purchase does your partner still not know the real price of?
What's the pettiest revenge you've ever taken on someone you love?
What conversation do you keep rehearsing but never start?
What's the real reason you take that long in the bathroom?
What's hidden in plain sight in your home right now?
What do you let your partner believe because it's easier?
What's the most scandalous place you've ever kissed someone?
Name your celebrity hall pass — and defend the choice.
What's the most scandalous thing you've ever done in a car?
Which message would you delete first if your phone hit the big screen right now?
What's the wildest thing on your bucket list that you've told no one?
What's the closest you've come to getting caught doing something you shouldn't?
What do you own purely for effect — and does it work?
What's your most effective flirting move, historically?
What's a secret about how you two got together that the room doesn't know?
What have you never told your partner because the moment passed?
What almost ended you two that seems ridiculous now?
What's the biggest romantic gesture you chickened out of?
What did you actually think the first time you saw your partner?
What's the most trouble you two have ever gotten into together?
What do you tease your partner about that you secretly adore?
What tiny thing would you change about your love story if you could?
